column1: Be careful with that vase because it's made of______________!
I started coughing because I had_____________at the back of my throat.
Don't put your hot cup on my new table! It's_________and I don't want you to bum it.
We should all recycle_____________so that it can be used again.
My dad gets__________every day on his way to work.
Of course you can have some milk. Get___________out of the cupboard.
